title: HEALTH PROMOTION SERVICES/NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SANA - 211info
text: NEXT DOOR HEALTH PROMOTION SERVICES/NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SANA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health navigator services and culturally appropriate health services, economic development, and education for the Latino community by focusing on wellness programs. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 645-3435 -. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 645-3435 Anna Osborn [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River County Services: Navigator Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Wellness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - HEALTH PROMOTION AND CHRONIC DISEASE PREVENTION EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - SUMMER CAMPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - GORGE YOUTH MENTORING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MID-COLUMBIA HEALTH EQUITY ADVOCATES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TREATMENT SERVICES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COLUMBIA GORGE PRIDE ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEXT DOOR
